_comment: Shared golden fixture pinning the allowed_files gitignore matcher to identical (patterns, paths) -> disallowed output across the two parallel implementations: Go ignorematch.Disallowed (cli/gh-student) and Python enforce_allowed_files's classifier (cli/gh-teacher/skeleton/dotgithub/scripts/runner.py). Both delegate to `git check-ignore`; this fixture catches edge-case drift between the two sides. `disallowed` lists exactly the input paths the patterns ignore (i.e. NOT allowed).

cases.name: ignore specific noise, allow the rest
last match wins; an excluded dir cannot be re-included via its contents
negating a dir does not re-include files under an excluded parent
extension allowlist only re-includes at top level (parent dirs stay excluded)
